case_title: PETER LYDON VS. HANDY TECHNOLOGIES INC., AKA HANDYBOOD CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A FOREIGN CORPORATION; DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYDON, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY TECHNOLOGIES INC., AKA HANDYBOOD CORPORATION (DBA HANDY)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.
